name: Staff of Fire
description:
You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Fire damage while you hold this staff.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Spells", "entries": ["The staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can cast one of the spells on the following table from it, using your spell save DC.
